task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into the ADAudit Plus application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the product settings or admin configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Admin', 'Settings', or 'Product Settings' tab/page is active in the ADAudit Plus UI.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Organization Name was set to the required value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for 'Organization Name' or similar contains the exact text 'Meridian National Bank - AD Audit Console'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Session Expiry was set to the required value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or input field for 'Session Expiry' or 'Session Timeout' shows '15' or '15 Minutes'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the configuration changes were saved and applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved successfully' confirmation message is visible, OR the new organization name 'Meridian National Bank' is visible in the application's header or branding area.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used a web browser to access the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8081, not a local file path or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the web browser UI forms, not executing curl, API, or database commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verifies the settings were genuinely saved in the application rather than visually manipulated.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to fake the visual appearance of the settings or branding.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Organization Name to be entered is exactly 'Meridian National Bank - AD Audit Console'. The expected Session Expiry timeout is exactly '15' (or '15 Minutes'). Look for the branding string 'Meridian National Bank' in the UI header/footer to confirm the settings were successfully applied.
